mainText:
Promo: "Join Bank of Entitlement today and get ready to unlock exclusive perks fit for royalty!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, I was at my usual brunch spot, sipping my double-shot macchiato when suddenly, the waitress had the audacity to suggest they were out of avocado toast. Avocado toast, can you believe it? Naturally, I demanded to speak with the manager. When the manager arrived, I explained, in my most dignified tone, that as a valued customer with a refined palate, this was simply unacceptable. I mean, how can a trendy establishment run out of such a basic staple of modern cuisine? After a dramatic pause and a subtle flick of my hair, the manager rushed to the kitchen, frantically searching for any remaining avocados. And guess what? Lo and behold, they miraculously found a few ripe avocados hidden away! The waitress returned with a freshly made, perfectly smashed avocado toast, and I, of course, graciously accepted. Ah, the sweet taste of entitlement. It truly pays to be me.
